description: The Naval Oceanographic Office requires an assessment of extreme seasonal SST shifts for ASW sonar planning. As an ASW Oceanographer, use the SST climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/ and the mandate at ~/Desktop/asw_thermal_mandate.txt to calculate the thermal amplitude between August and February. Export the difference map to ~/Documents/sst_difference.png and save a diagnostic report identifying the Northern Hemisphere region with the greatest seasonal thermal shift to ~/Documents/asw_report.txt.
